en: Now in these days when the disciples were increasing in number, a complaint by the Hellenists arose against the Hebrews because their widows were being neglected in the daily distribution.
zh: 門徒不斷增加的時候，講希臘話的猶太人，埋怨本地的希伯來人，因為在日常的供給上，忽略了他們的寡婦。

en: And the twelve summoned the full number of the disciples and said, "It is not right that we should give up preaching the word of God to serve tables.
zh: 於是十二使徒召集了眾門徒，說：“要我們放下 神的道，去管理伙食，是不合適的。

en: Therefore, brothers, pick out from among you seven men of good repute, full of the Spirit and of wisdom, whom we will appoint to this duty.
zh: 所以弟兄們，應當從你們中間選出七個有好見證、滿有聖靈和智慧的人，我們就派他們負責這事。

en: But we will devote ourselves to prayer and to the ministry of the word."
zh: 至於我們，我們要專心祈禱、傳道。”

en: And what they said pleased the whole gathering, and they chose Stephen, a man full of faith and of the Holy Spirit, and Philip, and Prochorus, and Nicanor, and Timon, and Parmenas, and Nicolaus, a proselyte of Antioch.
zh: 這個意見全會眾都很滿意，於是選出司提反，他是一位滿有信心和聖靈的人，還有腓利、伯羅哥羅、尼加挪、提門、巴米拿，以及歸信猶太教的安提阿人尼哥拉，

en: These they set before the apostles, and they prayed and laid their hands on them.
zh: 叫他們站在使徒面前。使徒禱告後，就為他們按手。

en: And the word of God continued to increase, and the number of the disciples multiplied greatly in Jerusalem, and a great many of the priests became obedient to the faith.
zh: 神的道傳開了；在耶路撒冷，門徒人數大大增加，有很多祭司也信從了真道。

en: And Stephen, full of grace and power, was doing great wonders and signs among the people.
zh: 司提反滿有恩惠能力，在民間施行大奇事和神蹟。

en: Then some of those who belonged to the synagogue of the Freedmen (as it was called), and of the Cyrenians, and of the Alexandrians, and of those from Cilicia and Asia, rose up and disputed with Stephen.
zh: 當時有幾個稱為“自由人”會堂的人，就是從古利奈和亞歷山太來的人，另外還有基利家人和亞西亞人，他們出面與司提反辯論，

en: But they could not withstand the wisdom and the Spirit with which he was speaking.
zh: 但司提反靠著聖靈和智慧說話，他們就抵擋不住。

en: Then they secretly instigated men who said, "We have heard him speak blasphemous words against Moses and God."
zh: 於是他們唆使眾人，說：“我們聽過他說謗瀆摩西和 神的話。”

en: And they stirred up the people and the elders and the scribes, and they came upon him and seized him and brought him before the council,
zh: 又煽動民眾、長老、經學家，這些人就來捉拿他，把他帶到公議會，

en: and they set up false witnesses who said, "This man never ceases to speak words against this holy place and the law,
zh: 並且造了假的證供說：“這人不斷抨擊聖地和律法。

en: for we have heard him say that this Jesus of Nazareth will destroy this place and will change the customs that Moses delivered to us."
zh: 我們聽他說過：‘這拿撒勒人耶穌要毀壞這地方，改變摩西傳給我們的規例。’”

en: And gazing at him, all who sat in the council saw that his face was like the face of an angel.
zh: 當時，坐在公議會裡的人，都注視他，見他的面貌像天使一樣。
